ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the file belongs to */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Full path and name of the file */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the file */,
  "c_plus_plus_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines written in C++ */,
  "c_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines written in C */,
  "markdown_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines written in Markdown */,
  "xml_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines written in XML */,
  "comment_lines" INTEGER /* Number of comment lines */,
  "blank_lines" INTEGER /* Number of blank lines */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines in the file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last modified */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the last commit that modified the file */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch the file belongs to in the version control system */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team lead, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
